response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for the opening segment. The Reference JSON only covers the first verse, so I have manually transcribed the subsequent vocals and audience chants present in the video. Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal audio waveform. I have also included the prominent unit names (Myth, Promise, Advent, Justice) as secondary on-screen text subtitles to provide context during the member introductions.
